FIRST BOT OF MARCH AAAAAAA. I started Mr. Scarletella like last week and I got super sick 😭

I am only NOW just starting to feel better sos!!

I can't even lie you guys the fictional men were NOT helping me through the flu and depressive episode 💔✌️

And I got back tg with my ex 🫩...

Yeah yall can flame me in the comments that might've not been my smartest decision ever.

ALSO VARKA IS SO SWEET. I meant for this to be like a super painfully slow burn but like...I might just give in immediately 🥹
